title: OpenAI exec Fidji Simo says she's stepping down due to chronic illness, will transition to advisor
summary: Fidji Simo, an OpenAI executive who took medical leave in April, is permanently stepping down from her role due to chronic illness to prioritize her recovery. She will transition to an advisory position at the company. This development underscores the personal toll of high-level executive roles in the demanding AI industry.
content: Fidji Simo stepped away from OpenAI in April for a medical leave, says she now has to focus on recovery.

zh.title: OpenAI高管Fidji Simo因慢性疾病辞职，将转任顾问
zh.summary: 曾在4月份休医假的OpenAI高管Fidji Simo因慢性疾病永久性辞去现职，以专注于康复。她将转任公司顾问职位。这一发展凸显了高层管理岗位在要求严苛的人工智能行业中所带来的个人代价。

title: Inside NATO's extraordinary 48 hours that revealed Trump's grip on global diplomacy
summary: A dramatic 48-hour period at NATO revealed Trump's significant influence over global diplomacy, with his shifting statements reshaping alliance discussions. Trump's changing position left NATO allies uncertain about U.S. commitment and strategy. This episode highlights how individual political figures can create diplomatic instability in established multilateral institutions.
content: Steve Sedgwick goes behind the scenes of NATO's dramatic 48 hours, where Trump's changing tone reshaped diplomacy and left allies guessing.

zh.title: NATO非凡的48小时内幕：揭示特朗普对全球外交的掌控
zh.summary: NATO非凡的48小时期间，特朗普对全球外交的重大影响力显露无遗，他不断变化的立场重塑了联盟讨论。特朗普态度的改变让北约盟国对美国承诺和战略感到困惑。这一插曲彰显了个人政治人物如何能够对既有多边机构造成外交不稳定。

title: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
summary: The Port of Rotterdam, Europe's largest port, faces legal pressure to accelerate its transition away from fossil fuel dependence. A lawsuit is demanding faster environmental action from the critical infrastructure hub. This case reflects mounting regulatory and legal pressure on major European ports to meet climate commitments.
content: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.

zh.title: 欧洲最大港口面临绿色转型压力
zh.summary: 欧洲最大港口鹿特丹港面临法律压力，需要加快摆脱化石燃料依赖的转变。诉讼要求这一关键基础设施枢纽采取更快的环保行动。这一案例反映了欧洲主要港口面临越来越多的监管和法律压力，以满足气候承诺。

title: We saved £6,000 on holidays by swapping homes with strangers
summary: Home-swapping has emerged as a cost-saving travel trend, with one family saving £6,000 on vacation expenses by exchanging homes with strangers. This approach reduces accommodation costs while offering authentic local experiences. The practice reflects broader consumer interest in alternative, budget-friendly travel methods.
content: The BBC looks at the growing trend of people swapping homes to cut holiday costs.

zh.title: 我们通过与陌生人互换房屋在假期上节省了6000英镑
zh.summary: 家庭互换已成为一种节省成本的旅游趋势，一个家庭通过与陌生人交换房屋在度假费用上节省了6000英镑。这种方式降低了住宿成本，同时提供了真实的本地体验。这一做法反映了消费者对替代性、经济实惠的旅游方式的广泛兴趣。

title: New Fed task force members share Chairman Kevin Warsh's embrace of AI
summary: The Federal Reserve's new AI advisory task force includes three members who, like Chairman Kevin Warsh, strongly support artificial intelligence development. All members share a pro-AI stance, signaling the Fed's openness to technology advancement. This composition suggests the central bank is preparing to engage constructively with AI applications in financial systems.
content: The three members of a task force advising the Fed on artificial intelligence are strong proponents of the technology.

zh.title: 新的美联储特别工作组成员支持主席凯文·沃什对人工智能的支持

title: Where Jim Cramer stands on SK Hynix's massive offering
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer views SK Hynix as attractively priced but cautions that investing in it represents a bet that current AI-driven chip demand will sustain unlike previous industry cycles. His analysis highlights both the opportunity and risk in semiconductor investments. The comment reflects broader market concerns about whether the current chip boom is sustainable.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SK Hynix looks remarkably cheap, but warned that buying it is a bet that the AI-driven memory boom won't end like previous cycles.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默对SK海力士大规模发行的看法

title: Taco Bell is reportedly pulling produce from some stores. Here’s what to know.
summary: Taco Bell is removing produce from some stores following an outbreak of a parasite-caused illness that has sickened over 1,000 people in Michigan. The precautionary measure reflects food safety concerns and potential contamination risks. This incident highlights the challenges food retailers face in managing supply chain safety during health emergencies.
content: An outbreak of a parasite-caused illness has sickened more than 1,000 people in Michigan.

title: Why a hidden divergence between the VIX and Nasdaq volatility has the smart money on edge
summary: A divergence between the VIX (broad market volatility indicator) and Nasdaq-specific volatility is causing concern among sophisticated traders despite ongoing bullish sentiment. Rising Nasdaq volatility suggests potential market stress despite overall bull market momentum. This technical pattern may signal that hedging strategies are warranted despite market optimism.
content: Traders are completely enthralled by the bull market — but surging Nasdaq volatility suggests it is time to hedge.

title: Can Walmart help the Fed harness real-time U.S. economic data? We’re about to find out.
summary: The Federal Reserve appointed a former Walmart CEO to a task force tasked with developing real-time economic data on spending, inflation, and growth. Walmart's retail data provides a unique window into consumer behavior and economic trends. This collaboration could give the Fed more immediate insights into economic conditions than traditional reporting methods.
content: The Federal Reserve named a former Walmart CEO to a task force to develop contemporaneous data on spending, inflation and growth.

title: A junior employee saved this company six figures using AI. Here’s how.

title: PepsiCo cut snack prices again, but not enough to get American consumers to buy more
summary: PepsiCo's price cuts failed to boost domestic consumer purchases as its North America business lagged in the latest quarter. The stock fell sharply despite strong international performance that beat earnings estimates.
content: PepsiCo’s North America business lagged in the latest quarter, and the stock was having its worst day in 15 months, even as strength in international business led to an earnings beat.

zh.title: 百事公司再次削减零食价格，但仍不足以吸引美国消费者购买更多
zh.summary: 百事公司的降价未能促进国内消费者购买，其北美业务在最近一个季度表现滞后。尽管国际业绩强劲并超过收益预期，但股价大幅下跌。

title: Wall Street is betting Trump doesn't want to disturb the stock market
summary: Wall Street maintains bullish sentiment despite escalating Middle East tensions, betting Trump prioritizes stock market stability. Investors believe market concerns will not derail his economic policies.
content: Despite the latest attacks in the Middle East, Wall Street still thinks stocks can go higher — for one simple reason.

zh.title: 华尔街押注特朗普不想扰乱股市
zh.summary: 尽管中东局势升级，华尔街仍保持看涨情绪，押注特朗普优先考虑股市稳定。投资者认为市场担忧不会阻碍他的经济政策。

title: June home sales disappoint as prices reach an all-time high
summary: June home sales fell month-over-month as mortgage rates remain stubbornly high, yet home prices reached all-time highs. The divergence deepens the nation's affordability crisis.
content: Home sales dropped in June month over month as mortgage rates remain stubbornly high. Prices hit an all-time high.

zh.title: 六月房屋销售令人失望，价格创历史新高
zh.summary: 六月房屋销售环比下降，抵押贷款利率仍居高不下，但房价达到历史最高水平。这种分化加深了全国的可负担性危机。

title: 8 things I learned about travel expenses after a family tragedy
summary: A personal account details critical lessons about managing travel expenses after a family crisis. The article emphasizes securing important travel insurance or protections before vacation.
content: Make this vital purchase before your next vacation.

zh.title: 家庭悲剧后我学到的关于旅行费用的8件事
zh.summary: 一份个人经历详细阐述了家庭危机后管理旅行费用的关键经验。该文章强调在度假前获得重要的旅行保险或保护措施的重要性。

title: Meta to put AI chip into production in September as it looks to double computing capacity, Reuters reports
summary: Meta plans to begin manufacturing its custom AI chip in September as part of efforts to double computing capacity. The move reflects competitive pressure to develop proprietary hardware for large-scale AI systems.
content: Meta plans to start manufacturing an artificial intelligence chip from September as part of its plan to boost overall computing power, Reuters reports.

zh.title: 据路透社报道，Meta将在9月启动AI芯片生产，同时计划将计算能力翻倍
zh.summary: Meta计划在9月开始生产其定制AI芯片，作为将计算能力翻倍的努力的一部分。此举反映了开发专有硬件用于大规模AI系统的竞争压力。

title: Home prices hit new all-time high, deepening affordability woes
summary: Home prices continue climbing to record levels even as buyer demand retreats from the market. The disconnect between rising prices and falling purchases intensifies housing affordability challenges.
content: Home prices continue to climb even as buyers retreat from the market, according to fresh data from the National Association of Realtors.

zh.title: 房价创历史新高，加剧可负担性困境
zh.summary: 房价持续攀升至历史记录水平，同时购房者需求从市场退缩。价格上升与购买力下降之间的脱节加剧了住房可负担性挑战。

title: Ohio is America's Top State for Business in 2026, capping yearslong rise with first No. 1 finish
summary: Ohio tops CNBC's 2026 state business rankings for the first time, capping a multiyear climb in competitiveness. The ranking recognizes the Buckeye State's improved business environment.
content: Ohio tops CNBC's rankings for the first time in 2026, with the Buckeye State culminating a yearslong climb as the place to do business in America.

zh.title: 俄亥俄州2026年美国最佳商业州，创历史首次排名第一
zh.summary: 俄亥俄州首次登顶CNBC 2026年州商业排名，结束多年竞争力提升。该排名认可了俄亥俄州商业环境的改善。

title: PepsiCo earnings miss estimates as U.S. consumers tighten their budgets
summary: PepsiCo reported quarterly earnings below estimates as American consumers tighten spending, despite strong international market growth. The weak domestic results highlight budget constraints among U.S. consumers.
content: PepsiCo reported weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings despite strong international demand.

zh.title: 百事公司未达预期，美国消费者勒紧裤腰带
zh.summary: 美国消费者支出收紧，百事公司季度收益低于预期，尽管国际市场增长强劲。疲弱的国内业绩突显了美国消费者的预算限制。

title: ‘I’ve no idea how they got her number’: My student-loan servicer called a friend after I missed a payment. Is that legal?
summary: A borrower questions the legality of their loan servicer contacting a friend after a missed payment, with the friend reporting repeated messages. The incident raises concerns about debt collection practices and consumer privacy.
content: “She said it’s the second message they have left.”

zh.title: "我完全不知道他们是怎么找到她的电话号码的":我的学生贷款服务商在我逾期还款后给我的朋友打电话。这合法吗?
zh.summary: 借款人质疑贷款服务商在其逾期还款后联系朋友的合法性,该朋友报告收到多次催收信息。该事件引发了对债务催收实践和消费者隐私的关注。

title: Meta jumps into AI coding market in effort to chase Anthropic and OpenAI
summary: Meta is advancing its Muse Spark AI model to compete in the rapidly growing AI coding market under new leadership. The initiative directly challenges Anthropic and OpenAI's dominance in AI development tools.
content: Meta is upgrading its Muse Spark artificial intelligence model under the leadership of AI chief Alexandr Wang.

zh.title: Meta跳入AI编码市场,努力追赶Anthropic和OpenAI
zh.summary: Meta正在推进其Muse Spark AI模型,以在新领导下竞争快速增长的AI编码市场。该举措直接挑战了Anthropic和OpenAI在AI开发工具中的主导地位。

title: ‘I get $1,460 in Social Security’: My millionaire ex-husband, 74, refuses to pay alimony. What can I do?
summary: A retiree living on $1,460 monthly Social Security seeks legal recourse against a millionaire ex-husband refusing alimony obligations. The case illustrates wealth disparity and enforcement challenges in family law.
content: “I have very little money, while my ex’s financial statements show assets in the millions.”

zh.title: "我每月只领取1,460美元的社会保障":我的百万富翁前夫,74岁,拒绝支付赡养费。我该怎么办?
zh.summary: 一位靠每月1,460美元社会保障生活的退休人士对拒绝支付赡养费义务的百万富翁前夫寻求法律救济。该案例说明了家庭法中的财富差异和执法困难。

title: SK Hynix Nasdaq listing may become the second-largest equity offering ever, trailing only SpaceX’s
summary: SK Hynix's Nasdaq listing could become the second-largest equity offering in history, following only SpaceX's recent record IPO. This represents a major capital raise for the South Korean chipmaker.
content: Friday’s offering of SK Hynix may become the second-largest equity offering ever.

zh.title: SK海力士纳斯达克上市可能成为有史以来第二大股票发行，仅次于SpaceX
zh.summary: SK海力士的纳斯达克上市可能成为历史上第二大股票发行，仅次于SpaceX最近创纪录的首次公开募股。这代表了这家韩国芯片制造商的一次重大融资。

title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
summary: A 73-year-old full-time worker seeks strategies to minimize taxes on Social Security benefits while maintaining active income. The article addresses tax planning considerations for older workers in this situation.
content: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

zh.title: "我不想最后收到意外的税单"：我今年73岁，仍然全职工作。我能避免为社会保障福利支付税款吗？
zh.summary: 一名73岁的全职工作者寻求最小化社会保障福利税款的策略，同时保持活跃收入。该文章涉及这种情况下老年工作者的税务规划考虑。

title: Former Dallas Cowboys cheerleader Reece Weaver buys $750,000 home in Alabama after sudden exit from squad
summary: Former Dallas Cowboys cheerleader Reece Weaver has departed the squad and purchased a $750,000 home in Alabama, marking a significant life transition. The move follows her rise to prominence through Netflix's "Cheer" series.
content: Netflix sensation and Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders darling Reece Weaver has already turned the page on her time with the team—and planted new roots in the state of Alabama

zh.title: 前达拉斯牛仔队啦啦队队员Reece Weaver在突然离开球队后在阿拉巴马州购买了75万美元的住宅
zh.summary: 前达拉斯牛仔队啦啦队队员Reece Weaver已经离开了球队，并在阿拉巴马州购买了一套75万美元的住宅，标志着她生活的重大转变。这一举动是在她通过Netflix的《欢呼》系列崭露头角之后。

title: AstraZeneca stock dives 9% after heart drug trial misses target
summary: AstraZeneca's stock plunged 9% after a late-stage clinical trial for its heart drug failed to achieve its primary endpoint. The setback impacts the U.K.'s largest drugmaker and investor confidence in its pipeline.
content: A late-stage clinical trial failed to miss its primary endpoint, U.K.'s laregst drugmaker said Thursday.

zh.title: 阿斯利康心脏病药物试验失败 股价暴跌9%
zh.summary: 阿斯利康股价在其心脏病药物晚期临床试验未能达到主要终点后暴跌9%。这一挫折影响了英国最大制药公司的地位以及投资者对其药物管线的信心。

title: Why the world’s best-performing stock market this year fell into bear territory
summary: South Korea's Kospi index entered bear market territory, falling more than 20% from its June 19 peak after a 5% decline on Wednesday. The drop marks a reversal for what had been the world's best-performing stock market this year.
content: The Kospi fell more than 5% on Wednesday, which brought it 20% below its June 19 record high, according to LSEG data.

zh.title: 全球表现最佳的股市今年为何陷入熊市
zh.summary: 韩国综合指数从6月19日的峰值下跌超过20%，在周三下跌5%后进入熊市。这一下跌标志着全球表现最佳股市的一个逆转。

title: 7-Eleven made $349 million from surge in gasoline prices in the U.S. last quarter
summary: 7-Eleven reported $349 million in profits from elevated gasoline prices in the last quarter, despite declining customer fill-up volumes. The windfall highlights the retailer's significant exposure to fuel market volatility.
content: Convenience store operator 7-Eleven on Thursday disclosed a $349 million profit from the surge in gasoline prices during the last quarter, even as fewer Americans filled their tanks.

zh.title: 7-Eleven上季度从美国汽油价格上涨中获得3.49亿美元利润
zh.summary: 7-Eleven报告上季度从汽油价格上升中获得3.49亿美元利润，尽管客户加油量下降。这笔意外之财凸显了这家零售商对燃料市场波动的重大敞口。

title: Life of Sizewell B extended by another 20 years
summary: The UK's Sizewell B nuclear power plant received approval for a 20-year life extension, now operating until 2055 instead of its original 2035 retirement. The decision supports Britain's nuclear energy capacity and climate goals.
content: The power plant was due to reach the end of its life in 2035 but will now continue until 2055.

zh.title: 塞兹韦尔B核电站延长运营20年
zh.summary: 英国塞兹韦尔B核电站获得批准延长20年运营期限，现将运营至2055年而非原计划的2035年退役。该决定支持英国的核能产能和气候目标。

title: Ukraine’s drone playbook is wreaking havoc in Russia — and upending where NATO wants to invest
summary: Ukraine's sophisticated drone strikes on Russian refineries are reshaping military strategy and prompting NATO to allocate $40 billion toward counter-drone capabilities. The tactic demonstrates the escalating importance of unmanned systems in modern warfare.
content: Ukraine’s deep drone strikes on Russian refineries are reshaping the war and pushing NATO toward a $40 billion counter-drone plan.

zh.title: 乌克兰无人机战术在俄罗斯造成严重破坏——重塑北约投资重点
zh.summary: 乌克兰对俄罗斯炼油厂的精密无人机攻击正在重塑军事战略，促使北约拨款400亿美元用于反无人机能力建设。这一战术表明无人系统在现代战争中的重要性不断上升。

title: Crypto still 'off the table' for Singapore's Temasek, four years after FTX flop
summary: Singapore's Temasek sovereign wealth fund remains reluctant to invest in cryptocurrency four years after its $275 million FTX writedown drew domestic criticism. The cautious stance reflects lingering concerns about sector stability and governance.
content: Temasek's investment in the now-bankrupt FTX cryptocurrency exchange led to a writedown of $275 million in 2022, drawing much local criticism.

zh.title: 新加坡淡马锡在FTX风波四年后仍将加密货币视为禁区
zh.summary: 新加坡淡马锡主权财富基金在其2.75亿美元FTX投资损失引发国内批评四年后，仍不愿投资加密货币。这一谨慎态度反映了对该行业稳定性和治理的持续担忧。

title: Jackdaw boss warns of winter fuel shortages if gas field not approved
summary: The operator of Adura's Jackdaw gas field warns that UK government approval is essential to prevent winter heating fuel shortages in the North Sea. The decision carries significant implications for domestic energy security.
content: Adura says the UK government must approve North Sea production urgently to avoid domestic supply shortages.

zh.title: Jackdaw老板警告称若气田未获批准将出现冬季燃料短缺
zh.summary: 埃德拉Jackdaw气田的运营商警告称，英国政府批准对防止北海冬季供暖燃料短缺至关重要。这一决定对国内能源安全具有重大影响。

title: Trump loses appeals court bid to delay paying E. Jean Carroll $5M in damages
summary: Trump's appeal to delay paying $5 million in damages to E. Jean Carroll was rejected by an appeals court. He was held civilly liable in two trials for defaming her when he denied her claims of sexual abuse. This represents a legal defeat in the ongoing defamation case.
content: Trump was held civilly liable in two trials for defaming E. Jean Carroll when he denied her claim he sexually abused her in a New York department store.

zh.title: 特朗普败诉上诉以延迟支付给E·让·卡罗尔的500万美元赔偿金
zh.summary: 特朗普延迟支付给E·让·卡罗尔500万美元赔偿金的上诉被法院驳回。在两起诉讼中，他因否认她的性虐待指控而被判民事诽谤责任。这代表了这起持续进行的诽谤案件中的法律败诉。

title: Oil extends gains as Iran-U.S. tensions raise concerns over supply disruptions
summary: Oil prices rose Thursday amid concerns about potential supply disruptions in the Middle East following fresh U.S. military strikes on Iran. The escalation of tensions between Washington and Tehran is driving investor worry about global oil availability. Rising geopolitical risks are supporting crude prices.
content: Oil rises Thursday, amid worries over supply disruptions in the Middle East following fresh strikes on Iran by the U.S. military.

zh.title: 随着伊朗-美国紧张局势引发供应中断担忧，油价继续上涨
zh.summary: 周四油价上升，原因是美国对伊朗进行新的军事打击后中东潜在供应中断的担忧。华盛顿和德黑兰之间紧张局势的升级正在推动投资者对全球石油供应的担忧。地缘政治风险上升正在支撑原油价格。

title: China consumer price growth weakens in June while producer inflation rises to near 4-year high
summary: China's consumer price growth slowed in June while producer inflation climbed to a near four-year high, widening the gap between the two measures. The divergence reflects an economy with robust exports but weak domestic demand, a pattern becoming a structural feature of China's economy. Investors are increasingly viewing this two-speed growth as a defining long-term characteristic.
content: Investors increasingly view China's two-speed growth with robust export and tepid domestic demand as a defining long-term feature of the Chinese economy.

zh.title: 中国6月消费物价增长放缓，生产者通胀升至近四年高点
zh.summary: 中国6月消费物价增长放缓，而生产者通胀升至近四年高点，扩大了两者之间的差距。这种分化反映了一个出口强劲但国内需求疲弱的经济体，这种模式正成为中国经济的结构性特征。投资者越来越多地将这种两速增长视为一个长期特征。

title: AirPods maker Luxshare slides over 5% in Hong Kong debut
summary: Luxshare, the manufacturer of AirPods, declined over 5 percent during its Hong Kong stock market debut despite raising HK$24.27 billion ($3.09 billion). The company, already listed in Shenzhen, priced shares at 63.28 Hong Kong dollars each. The opening day decline signals investor caution despite the substantial capital raise.
content: The company, which is already listed in Shenzhen, had priced shares in the IPO at 63.28 Hong Kong dollars apiece, raising HK$24.27 billion ($3.09 billion).

zh.title: AirPods代工厂Luxshare香港上市首日下跌逾5%
zh.summary: 作为AirPods制造商的Luxshare尽管融资242.7亿港元（30.9亿美元），但在香港股市上市首日跌幅超过5%。这家已在深圳上市的公司股价定在每股63.28港元。首日下跌反映出投资者谨慎态度，尽管融资规模庞大。

title: Platner quits Maine Senate race; Democrats set to pick new nominee
summary: Maine Democratic Senate candidate Platner has withdrawn from the race, forcing Democrats to quickly nominate a replacement. The timing creates pressure with less than four months remaining until midterm elections. The sudden vacancy leaves Democrats scrambling to identify and vet a new candidate.
content: Maine Democrats must now replace Platner with less than four months until the midterm elections.

zh.title: Platner退出缅因州参议院竞选；民主党准备提名新候选人
zh.summary: 缅因州民主党参议院候选人Platner已退出竞选，迫使民主党迅速提名替代者。距离中期选举不到四个月的时间使局势紧急。突然出现的空缺促使民主党仓促地寻找和审查新候选人。

title: Levi’s is finding new ways to win customers — by looking toward tops and ‘denim luxury’
summary: Levi's raised its full-year earnings outlook for the second consecutive time, signaling strong business momentum and consumer demand. The iconic jeans maker is diversifying into new categories including tops and premium positioning labeled as 'denim luxury.' Despite the positive guidance, shares fell in after-hours trading.
content: Jeans maker raises its full-year outlook for the second straight time, but shares fall after hours

zh.title: Levi's找到赢得客户的新方式——拓展上装和"牛仔奢侈品"
zh.summary: Levi's连续第二次上调全年收益预期，显示强劲的业务势头和消费者需求。这家标志性牛仔裤制造商正在拓展新品类，包括上装和被称为"牛仔奢侈品"的高端定位。尽管前景向好，但该公司股价在盘后交易中下跌。

title: World Cup drives Google Search to record queries per second
summary: Google Search reached a record number of queries per second, driven by unprecedented interest in the World Cup. The surge was fueled by global interest in Lionel Messi and Argentina's World Cup campaign. This milestone represents a significant traffic achievement for the search giant.
content: The milestone comes amid Lionel Messi and Argentina's popularity.

zh.title: 世界杯推动谷歌搜索创造每秒查询量纪录
zh.summary: 谷歌搜索达到了创纪录的每秒查询量,受到了对世界杯前所未有的关注驱动。这次激增由全球对梅西和阿根廷世界杯征程的兴趣推动。这一里程碑代表了搜索巨头的重大流量成就。

title: Higher gas prices aren’t the only way rising tensions with Iran will hit home
summary: Wall Street analysts expect Trump's declaration that the Iran cease-fire is over will hurt airlines and home builders more than it benefits oil companies. The economic impact of escalating Middle East tensions extends well beyond higher gas prices. Multiple sectors face pressure from geopolitical uncertainty.
content: Wall Street expects President Donald Trump’s call that the Iran cease-fire is over will hurt airlines and home builders more than it will help oil companies.

zh.title: 伊朗紧张局势升级对家庭的影响不仅仅是汽油价格上升
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师预计,特朗普宣布伊朗停火结束将对航空公司和房屋建筑商造成的伤害比对石油公司的益处更大。中东紧张局势升级的经济影响远远超出了更高的汽油价格。多个行业面临地缘政治不确定性的压力。
